sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'yo' (I) changes the subject of the sentence, which alters the meaning significantly.
Replacing 'donde' (where) with 'no' (no/not) changes the question from asking 'where' to a negation, which significantly alters the meaning.
'Avisaras' (you will notify) and 'revisara' (he/she will review) are different actions, but both relate to what will happen next. The meaning is somewhat preserved but not exact.
